title: pteris japonica
intro: Pteris japonica, also known as the Japanese Brake fern, is a species of fern belonging to the family Pteridaceae. It has been traditionally used in medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial activities. The plant is said to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, alleviating respiratory issues, and protecting against cancer. Pteris japonica is often prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or dried extracts for its medicinal and therapeutic uses.
